testsuite.name: 请求验证测试

testcase.name: 无效 JSON 应返回错误
缺少 ruleId 的请求应返回错误
缺少 Content-Type 应返回错误
错误的 Content-Type 应返回错误

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:49.053 [Test worker] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$RequestValidationTests]: RequestValidationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-29 17:22:49.061 [Test worker] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.ruleengine.RuleEngineApplication for test class com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$RequestValidationTests 2026-03-29 17:22:49.068 [Test worker] WARN o.s.w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver - Resolved [org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException: JSON parse error: Unexpected character ('i' (code 105)): was expecting double-quote to start field name] 2026-03-29 17:22:49.081 [Test worker] WARN o.s.w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver - Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.example.ruleengine.model.DecisionResponse> com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionController.decide(com.example.ruleengine.model.DecisionRequest): [Field error in object 'decisionRequest' on field 'ruleId': rejected value [null];
